---
title: "Course 4: MLOps for Scaling TinyML"
---

```{=html}
<!-- Base URL for all TinyML courseware PDFs — change here if the source repo moves -->
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  var BASE = 'https://github.com/tinyMLx/courseware/raw/master/edX';
  document.querySelectorAll('a[data-tinyml]').forEach(function(a) {
    a.href = BASE + '/' + a.getAttribute('data-tinyml');
    a.target = '_blank';
  });
});
</script>

<div style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">
  <a href="tinyml.html" class="btn-outline">← Back to TinyML Overview</a>
  <a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases/download/slides-latest/MLSysBook-TinyML-All.zip" class="btn-accent" target="_blank">Download All (ZIP)</a>
  <a href="https://www.edx.org/professional-certificate/harvardx-tiny-machine-learning" class="btn-outline" target="_blank">edX Course</a>
</div>

<!-- ================================================================ -->
<!-- CHAPTER 5: MLOps for Scaling TinyML -->
<!-- ================================================================ -->
<div class="module-card">
  <span class="tag">Chapter 5 · Course 4</span>
  <h3>MLOps for Scaling TinyML</h3>
  <p class="module-desc">Machine Learning Operations through the lens of TinyML: ML development, training operationalization, continuous training, model conversion, deployment at scale, prediction serving, continuous monitoring, and responsible AI.</p>
  <span class="companion">Textbook companion: <a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/vol1/">Vol I Ch 14–15</a></span>
</div>

<div class="module-card">
  <h4 class="section-header-sm">§5.1 Welcome to MLOps for Scaling TinyML</h4>
  <table class="section-list">
    <thead>
      <tr><th>Topic</th><th class="dl-col">Type</th></tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-1-1.pdf">What to Expect in This Course</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-1-2.pdf">Welcome Message</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-1-3.pdf">Who Should Take This Course?</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-1-4.pdf">The Past, Present and Future of ML</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-1-5.pdf">Why the Future of ML is Tiny and Bright</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-1-6.pdf">Machine Learning Lifecycle</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-1-7.pdf">Review of Course 1, 2 &amp; 3</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-1-9.pdf">Scaling TinyML</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-1-10.pdf">Introduction to MLOps</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-1-11.pdf">Overview of MLOps</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-1-12.pdf">Course Structure</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-1-13.pdf">Course Activities</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-1-14.pdf">Your Mindset: T-Shaped Skills Needed for ML Engineers</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-1-19.pdf">Who's Who in MLOps for TinyML?</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<div class="module-card">
  <h4 class="section-header-sm">§5.2 MLOps: The Big Picture</h4>
  <table class="section-list">
    <thead>
      <tr><th>Topic</th><th class="dl-col">Type</th></tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-2-1.pdf">Overview of MLOps Objectives</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-2-2.pdf">What is MLOps, DevOps, and AI Ops</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-2-4.pdf">MLOps: A Use Case Overview</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-2-5.pdf">MLOps Persona</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-2-6.pdf">MLOps: Key Activities and Lifecycle</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<div class="module-card">
  <h4 class="section-header-sm">§5.3 ML Development</h4>
  <table class="section-list">
    <thead>
      <tr><th>Topic</th><th class="dl-col">Type</th></tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-3-1.pdf">Overview of ML Development</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-3-2.pdf">ML Development</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-3-3.pdf">Problem Definition</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="other/5-3-4.pdf">How Might You Define KWS</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-3-5.pdf">Data Selection for KWS</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-3-6.pdf">Why Real Data Matters</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-3-7.pdf">Data Exploration</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-3-8.pdf">Data Visualization Tools</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-3-10.pdf">Feature Engineering</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-3-11.pdf">Feature Engineering for KWS: A Case Study</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-3-12.pdf">Model Prototyping</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-3-13.pdf">Model Prototyping: Research vs. Production</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-3-15.pdf">Model Validation</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-3-16.pdf">Model Evaluation</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-3-18.pdf">Data Engineering</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-3-19.pdf">ML Development Impact on MLOps</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<div class="module-card">
  <h4 class="section-header-sm">§5.4 Training Operationalization</h4>
  <table class="section-list">
    <thead>
      <tr><th>Topic</th><th class="dl-col">Type</th></tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-4-1.pdf">Overview of Training Operationalization</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-4-2.pdf">Training Operationalization</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-4-3.pdf">CI/CD Triggers</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="other/5-4-5.pdf">Software Artifacts</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-4-6.pdf">Continuous Integration</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-4-7.pdf">CI Tools</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-4-8.pdf">Continuous Delivery</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-4-10.pdf">Production Deployment</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-4-11.pdf">Online Experimentation</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-4-12.pdf">Production Deployment in ML Deployment</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="other/5-4-13.pdf">Case Study Discussion</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-4-14.pdf">Training Operationalization Impact on MLOps</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<div class="module-card">
  <h4 class="section-header-sm">§5.5 Continuous Training</h4>
  <table class="section-list">
    <thead>
      <tr><th>Topic</th><th class="dl-col">Type</th></tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-5-1.pdf">Overview of Continuous Training</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-5-2.pdf">Continuous Training</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-5-3.pdf">Retraining Triggers</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-5-5.pdf">Data Processing Overview</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-5-6.pdf">Data Engineering for Everyone</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-5-8.pdf">Data Ingestion</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-5-9.pdf">Data Validation</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-5-10.pdf">Data Transformation</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-5-12.pdf">Training vs. Tuning</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-5-13.pdf">Training with AutoML</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-5-14.pdf">Neural Architecture Search (NAS) - Part 1</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-5-16.pdf">Neural Architecture Search (NAS) - Part 2</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-5-17.pdf">The Carbon Price of AutoML: CO2</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-5-18.pdf">Continuous Training with Transfer Learning</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-5-19.pdf">Pros and Cons of Transfer Learning</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-5-21.pdf">Continuous Training Metrics</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="other/5-5-22.pdf">Metrics for Continuous Training</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-5-23.pdf">Continuous Training Impact on MLOps</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a href="https://colab.research.google.com/github/harvard-edge/multilingual_kws/blob/main/multilingual_kws_intro_tutorial.ipynb" target="_blank">Optional: Multilingual Spoken Words Colab</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-colab">Colab</span></td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<div class="module-card">
  <h4 class="section-header-sm">§5.6 Model Conversion</h4>
  <table class="section-list">
    <thead>
      <tr><th>Topic</th><th class="dl-col">Type</th></tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-6-1.pdf">Overview of Model Conversion</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-6-X.pdf">Model Conversion</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-6-3.pdf">ML Frameworks &amp; The Lay of the Land</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-6-4.pdf">TF vs. TFLite vs. TFLite Micro</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-6-5.pdf">TFLite Micro for TinyML</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-6-7.pdf">Model Pruning</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-6-8.pdf">Model Clustering</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-6-10.pdf">Model Quantization</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-6-11.pdf">Collaborative Optimizations</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-6-12.pdf">Student Teacher Networks / Knowledge Distillation</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-6-13.pdf">Model Conversion Impact on MLOps</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="other/5-6-14.pdf">Model Conversion Case Study - Smart DoorBell</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<div class="module-card">
  <h4 class="section-header-sm">§5.7 Model Deployment</h4>
  <table class="section-list">
    <thead>
      <tr><th>Topic</th><th class="dl-col">Type</th></tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-7-1.pdf">Overview of Model Deployment</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-7-2.pdf">Model Deployment</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-7-3.pdf">Scaling ML into Production Deployment</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-7-5.pdf">Containers for Scaling ML Deployment</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-7-6.pdf">Dockers vs. VMs</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-7-8.pdf">Challenges for Scaling TinyML Deployment (Part 1)</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-7-9.pdf">Challenges for Scaling TinyML Deployment (Part 2)</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="other/5-7-10.pdf">Challenges of Scaling TinyML Deployment</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-7-11.pdf">Anything As A Service</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-7-12.pdf">TinyMLaaS (Part 1): An Introduction</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-7-13.pdf">TinyMLaaS (Part 2): Design Overview</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-7-14.pdf">Summary of TinyMLaaS</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-7-16.pdf">Model Deployment Impact on MLOps</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="other/5-7-17.pdf">Driving Mode Detection Case Study</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<div class="module-card">
  <h4 class="section-header-sm">§5.8 Prediction Serving</h4>
  <table class="section-list">
    <thead>
      <tr><th>Topic</th><th class="dl-col">Type</th></tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-8-1.pdf">Overview of Prediction Serving</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-8-2.pdf">Prediction Serving</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-8-3.pdf">Prediction Serving Scenarios</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-8-4.pdf">Prediction Serving Scenarios: Batch</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-8-5.pdf">Prediction Serving Scenarios: Online</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-8-7.pdf">Prediction Serving Scenarios: Streaming</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-8-8.pdf">Prediction Serving Scenarios: Embedded</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-8-10.pdf">Prediction Serving Architectures</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-8-12.pdf">Embedded Inference Serving Benchmarks</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-8-13.pdf">Embedded Benchmarks: An Overview</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-8-14.pdf">MLPerf Tiny</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-8-16.pdf">Prediction Serving Impact on MLOps</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<div class="module-card">
  <h4 class="section-header-sm">§5.9 Continuous Monitoring</h4>
  <table class="section-list">
    <thead>
      <tr><th>Topic</th><th class="dl-col">Type</th></tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-9-1.pdf">Overview of Continuous Monitoring</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-9-2.pdf">Continuous Monitoring</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-9-3.pdf">Model Drift: The Big Picture</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-9-4.pdf">Concept Drift</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-9-5.pdf">Data Drift</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-9-8.pdf">Dealing With Drift</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-9-9.pdf">Continuous Evaluation Challenges for TinyML</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-9-10.pdf">TinyML Communication Challenges &amp; Technologies for Continuous Monitoring</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-9-12.pdf">On-device Training: Limitations and Opportunities</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-9-13.pdf">Continuous Monitoring with Federated ML</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-9-14.pdf">Federated Learning Gboard</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-9-16.pdf">Continuous Monitoring Impact on MLOps</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="other/5-9-17.pdf">The Privacy vs Performance Trade Off</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a href="https://colab.research.google.com/github/tinyMLx/colabs/blob/course4/5_9_9_FederatedLearning.ipynb" target="_blank">Optional: Federated Learning Colab</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-colab">Colab</span></td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<div class="module-card">
  <h4 class="section-header-sm">§5.10 Data &amp; Model Management</h4>
  <table class="section-list">
    <thead>
      <tr><th>Topic</th><th class="dl-col">Type</th></tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-10-1.pdf">Model vs. Data Management</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-10-2.pdf">Data and Model Management</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<div class="module-card">
  <h4 class="section-header-sm">§5.11 Responsible AI: Transparency &amp; Sustainability</h4>
  <table class="section-list">
    <thead>
      <tr><th>Topic</th><th class="dl-col">Type</th></tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-11-1.pdf">Responsible AI Overview</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-11-2.pdf">Sustainability of TinyML</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-11-3.pdf">Sustainable AI</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-11-5.pdf">Model Cards for Transparency</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-11-7.pdf">TinyML for Social Impact</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<div class="module-card">
  <h4 class="section-header-sm">§5.12 Summary</h4>
  <table class="section-list">
    <thead>
      <tr><th>Topic</th><th class="dl-col">Type</th></tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="readings/5-12-1.pdf">Course Summary</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-reading">Reading</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-12-2.pdf">Key Concepts of MLOps</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td><a data-tinyml="slides/5-12-3.pdf">What's Next?</a></td>
        <td class="dl-col"><span class="badge-slides">Slides</span></td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>
```

::: {.callout-note}
These materials were originally developed for the [HarvardX Professional Certificate in Tiny Machine Learning](https://www.edx.org/professional-certificate/harvardx-tiny-machine-learning) on edX. See the [original curriculum](tinyml/README-edx-original.md) for the full item-by-item breakdown including forum prompts and quizzes not listed above.
:::
